SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-25-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF BRYANT CHOI IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED CANTONESE-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU (#300949). DEFENDANT YU YUN TIAN (TRUE NAME: YU YUN TIEN) IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED MANDARIN-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER HWASHING KWEI (#301159) (INTERPRETER IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM) WITH WITNESS CHICH TING TIEN AND WITNESS JEN LEE. COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO BE AMENDED TO ADD DEFENDANT CHICH T TIEN. COURT ORDERS RECORD CORRECTED TO REFLECT DEFENDANT "YU YUN TIAN"'S CORRECT/TRUE NAME IS "YU YUN TIEN." PLAINTIFF WAIVES JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU/S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
